title: From Byju’s, Koo to Bluelearn: 7 Indian startups that went from hype to layoffs and shutdowns
snippet: From Byju's and Koo to GoMechanic and Bluelearn, several Indian startups that once attracted massive funding and rapid growth later faced layoffs, financial troubles, governance issues, or shutdowns.

title: White House to issue an executive order on govt review of advanced AI models before launch
snippet: The White House is expected to issue an executive order as early as Thursday proposing a voluntary framework for government review of advanced artificial intelligence models before their public release, CNN reported, citing sources familiar with the matter.

title: India needs dedicated AI law as current legal framework inadequate to tackle emerging risks: Cyber Expert Pavan Duggal
snippet: India needs a dedicated law on artificial intelligence as existing legal frameworks are not adequate to deal with the risks emerging from AI, cyber law and artificial intelligence law expert Pavan Duggal said on the sidelines of FICCI's CyberComm event in the national capital.

title: Sony PlayStation State of Play June edition announced: How to watch, live-stream timings and what to expect
snippet: The June State of Play will showcase Marvel's Wolverine game along with 60 minutes of game announcements from other top studios.The event will stream live on June 2 at 2PM PT.

title: Will you get free YouTube Premium Lite with Jio Google AI Pro plan? Google says there's a catch
snippet: Google is adding the YouTube Premium Lite benefit for paying members. However, the Lite subscription is not available during the 18-month free trial for users with complimentary access via Reliance Jio.

title: Tata semiconductor plant in Assam to begin production soon: CM Himanta Sarma
snippet: The Tata semiconductor plant in Assam is set to start production soon, according to Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma. It marks a critical step forward for the industrial sector of the state and supports the broader national framework for advanced semiconductor development.
